Petition To Determine Invalidity Of Amendments To Trust And To Require Trustee To Post Bond
Off Calendar Aug-01-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bradley Kass for Marlon Redmond. Joseph Corey for Ida Robinson.

The matter was referred to the department of the Presiding Judge (206) to be set for trial, (order for the same signed in open court).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

Petition To Determine Invalidity Of Amendments To Trust And To Require Trustee To Post Bond
Off Calendar Jul-25-2011 Continued To Aug-01-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Invalidity Of Amendments To Trust And To Require Trustee To Post Bond
Off Calendar Jun-27-2011 Continued To Jul-25-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Invalidity Of Amendments To Trust And To Require Trustee To Post Bond
Off Calendar May-23-2011 Continued To Jun-27-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joseph Corey for Ida Robinson. Bradley Kass for Marlon Redmond.

The Parties reported that discovery is not concluded, that they will not do mediaiton but that they will engage in settlement discussions. The Court will not send the matter out to trial until discovery is concluded. The Petition to Determine Invalidity of Amendments to Trust was continued to June 27, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.

Petition To Determine Invalidity Of Amendments To Trust And To Require Trustee To Post Bond
Off Calendar Mar-28-2011 Continued To May-23-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Specially Prepared Interrogatories; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Separate Statement Of Interrogatories In Dispute; Declaration Of Joseph P. Corey
Off Calendar Mar-24-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joseph Corey for Nina Turpie (Petitioner). Bradley Kass for Respondent.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court adopted the tentative as follows: Grant as to specially prepared interrogatories 20 and 21: Petitioner's request for sanctions is granted in the total amount of $1,200.00 against Respondent Marlon Redmond and his counsel: Respondent's request for sanctions is denied. Mr. Corey presented a proposed to Mr. Kass in open court. The Court will sign the order upon review. The March 28, 2011 hearing date on the Petition to Determine Invalidity of Amendments to Trust etc. was continued to May 23, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of discovery, status of mediation and/or trial setting.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition To Determine Invalidity Of Amendments To Trust And To Require Trustee To Post Bond
Off Calendar Feb-28-2011 Continued To Mar-28-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Invalidity Of Amendments To Trust And To Require Trustee To Post Bond
Off Calendar Dec-20-2010 Continued To Feb-28-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bradley Kass for Marlon Redmond (Respondent). Joseph Corey for Ida Robinson.

Counsel stated that they were still conducting discovery and that they had discussion regarding mediation. Mr. Corey is amenable to Mr. Kass' response on file to the original petition being deemed the response to the second amended petition. The matter was continued to February 28, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of discovery and trial setting.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition To Determine Invalidity Of Amendments To Trust And To Require Trustee To Post Bond
Off Calendar Nov-08-2010 Continued To Dec-20-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joseph Corey for Petitioners. Bradley Kass for Marlon Redmond (Respondent).

Mr. Corey stated that discovery had been served and responded to, and that he would receive additional responses within fifteen days. The matter was continued to December 20, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for further status.

Judge: Monica Wiley. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Anasse.

Petition To Determine Invalidity Of Amendments To Trust And To Require Trustee To Post Bond
Off Calendar Aug-02-2010 Continued To Nov-08-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joseph Corey for Petitioner. Bradley Kass for Marlowe Redmond (Respondent).

Mr. Kass stated that he would like the opportunity to respond to the amendments, that discovery had not been conducted, that they had no informal discussions and asked that the matter be put out for 90 days. Counsel stated that they were amenable to mediation. The matter was continued to November 8, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of discovery and whether to mediate. The Court encouraged exchange of information and resolving the matter.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.
